caption: A man is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT" and a black baseball cap with a logo on the front. He wears large over-ear headphones and a gold chain. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background features a white wall with gold stars and repeated text that reads "GRIND HUSTLE", alongside a dark backdrop with large red and white text stating "BOSS TALK 101". A logo in the bottom left corner reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand, moving it from a relaxed position near his side to an open, active gesture in front of him. His facial expression shifts as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing to form words.
